issues.summary: Implement Test DAG MLOps based on SDK
issues.description:
Acceptance criteria:

1. Test DAG fully written using SDK
2. Test DAG successfully running E2E 2.10.3

Provide support and handle issues arising from the MWAA upgrade to version 2.10.3.

This includes monitoring for compatibility issues, fixing DAG failures caused by the upgrade, and ensuring all pipelines are running correctly on the new version.
